tasks.title: Queue/orchestrator reliability automation hardening 1
tasks.prompt: Execute one MVP slice only: improve queue/orchestrator runtime reliability tooling (diagnostics, safety checks, deterministic transitions, docs/runbook guidance) without changing product API/UI behavior.
tasks.verifyCommand: pnpm run docs:lint && pnpm run infra-policy-check && pnpm --filter api typecheck && pnpm --filter web typecheck
